caption:
HubSpot asked consumers what "immediate" means when they reach out to a business.

The answer: 10 minutes or less. Not by end of day. Not "we'll get back to you." Ten minutes, or the moment is gone.

82% of consumers rate an immediate response to a sales question as important or very important. Your lead's clock starts the second they hit send. They don't care that you were on a roof or mid-appointment.

Most service businesses aren't close. Industry research shows only 17% answer a new lead within an hour, let alone ten minutes. Businesses that respond within 5 minutes convert at about double the rate of everyone else.

DM "IMMEDIATE"

#SpeedToLead #ServiceBusiness #LeadFollowUp #HomeServices #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Fills the under-served Third-Party Research category with a fresh HubSpot data point (the 10-minute definition of 'immediate') the account hasn't used, in the carousel format research shows wins saves for educational content.
